texto: The word 'proof' should strictly only be used when we are dealing with deductive inferences.... Popper claimed that scientists only need to use deductive inferences.... So if a scientist is only interested in demonstrating that a given theory is false, she may be able to accomplish her goal without the use of inductive inferences.... When a scientist collects experimental data, her aim might be to show that a particular theory...is false. She will have to resort to inductive reasoning.... So Popper's attempt to show that science can get by without induction does not succeed.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Samir Okasha sobre temas ligados a saude mental. A afirmação “The word 'proof' should strictly only be used when we are dealing with deductive inferences.... P…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a saude-mental, deductive-logic, inductive-logic, útil em momentos de inductive-logic e karl-popper.
